positive.text: Very good experience here ! Only one thing to say : delicious
positive.reply: Ben thank you so very much for this wonderful Five Star Review! We really appreciate it and can't wait to have you back for more DELICIOUSNESS!!!

positive.text: Love the feel and vibe of this place. We came on a Friday night at 630pm with reservations and were seated right away.
positive.reply: Steven, thank you for taking the time to share this, it truly means a lot to our entire team. We're so glad you felt the energy of the room and the way our team supports one another.

positive.text: Highly recommend the Lemon Financier, it's great with their coffee and you'll end up fighting over the crumbs!
positive.reply: Thank you so very much Liam! So glad that you loved the Lemon Financier! We look forward to seeing you back soon!

positive.text: What a delightful dining experience! The French-style cuisine, from the fish to the chicken and mussels, and the burger...
positive.reply: Thank you so very much! This is definitely a review we look forward to sharing with the team! Looking forward to welcoming you back soon!
Jake- thank you for calling out the outstanding service from Jeremy. We look forward to your next visit and thank you for the five stars!

positive.text: Le Supreme was recommended to me on a flight into Detroit a couple weeks ago and it beat all the accolades he gave.
positive.reply: Craig- what an incredible mention! We love that we can be the topic of conversation of travelers and love the fact that we beat the expectations even more!

positive.text: Ignore the negative comments. The food and the service were amazing. The toilets are clean and the dining area is very...
positive.reply: Adrien - thank you for the specific mention regarding other posts! We pride ourselves in genuine hospitality, incredible service and being the friendliest establishment downtown.
Donna- thank you for calling out our food and atmosphere. We love that you found our establishment easy to talk and suitable for all group sizes.

positive.text: Le Suprême was my choice for a special anniversary dinner and it did not disappoint. Located inside the beautiful Book...
positive.reply: Luis- thank you for such a glowing review and trusting us with your special anniversary dinner.

positive.text: Went there for my birthday. They made everything special!
positive.reply: Elaine- we loved making your birthday special! Thank you for trusting us to do so.

positive.text: Le Suprême is an elegant French-style restaurant in downtown Detroit that feels like stepping into a Parisian brasserie.
positive.reply: Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful review! We're delighted to hear that your experience at Le Suprême captured the charm and elegance of a classic European atmosphere.

positive.text: Fantastic everything just so everyone is aware make reservations, and plan your parking
positive.reply: Bradman, we are delighted you had a fantastic experience with us! Thank you for providing some great photos of some of our brunch items!

mixed.text: Beautiful restaurant with French vibes. Enjoyed the food and cocktails were great!
mixed.reply: Thank you so very much MP! We hope to see you back real soon!

mixed.text: The place was super cute and the staff was amazing, but the food was just alright. We came for a girls night and ordered...
mixed.reply: Thank you for joining us and for taking the time to share your feedback. I'm very glad to hear you enjoyed the atmosphere, our team, and especially the chocolate soufflé.

mixed.text: My husband and I ate at this restaurant this passed Sunday. While the food is very good, the service is very subpar.
mixed.reply: Thank you for your detailed feedback. If you can, please email us at info@lesupremedetroit.com so we can speak with you directly.

mixed.text: I had the privilege of dining here yesterday and the Filet Mignon was incredibly flavorful (medium rare). The spinach...
mixed.reply: Elias, We are so glad you enjoyed your Filet Mignon, mashed potatoes and fries. We will relay the note about the spinach to our culinary team.

mixed.text: Food very good. Service a bit slow.
mixed.reply: Thank you for your support, Detroit!

mixed.text: The waiter was amazing. The food was less amazing. There are probably better places to have breakfast.
mixed.reply: Shannon, while we are so glad to hear that your service was amazing, we are less than thrilled to hear that the food didn't compare.

mixed.text: I got the fish with saffron and there was literally no saffron on it. I could smell a very faint essence of saffron.
mixed.reply: Thank you for your thoughtful feedback, Heba. I'm glad to hear you enjoyed the atmosphere and that the fish itself was well prepared.

mixed.text: Seemed like the girl behind the bar was more intent of trying to impress the girl I was with talking with.
mixed.reply: Thank you for the feedback Rob. The experience you described is certainly not up to the standard we hold ourselves to.

mixed.text: Vibe but the food was mid
mixed.reply: Denisha, Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're happy to hear you enjoyed the vibe, and we appreciate your honest thoughts on the food.

mixed.text: We came here for NYE and we made our reservations the same night so we were happy to be able get in.
mixed.reply: Rita, we're so happy we were able to accommodate you on NYE! It's wonderful to hear you enjoyed the oysters, escargots, and the steak frites.

negative.text: Unfortunately, very underwhelming. Wine was mediocre, $30 charcuterie came with 5 different small pieces of cheese and a small thing of jam, nothing else. Perhaps dinner is better, but for the basics, I'll pass.

negative.reply: Thank you for your feedback, Tomasso. I'm sorry to hear that your experience fell short across the board, that's certainly not the standard we aim to deliver.

negative.text: Bathroom uncleanly… seafood smells fishy.. 2 hour wait and still no burger yes that is correct no burger.
negative.reply: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback, Nicolai. I'm sorry to hear your experience did not meet expectations.

negative.text: I would not recommend this restaurant for a large group dinner.
negative.reply: Danielle- we would love an opportunity to speak with you directly. If you could, please send us an email directly at info@lesupremedetroit.com.

negative.text: My wife and I dined here on 3/6/26 with another couple and spent close to $600. The food was excellent and our server...
negative.reply: Brian- thank you for flagging this. We can assure you that the security team of the building was aware of the situation and monitoring the evening.

negative.text: My husband and I decided to go to LeSupreme for dinner this past Sunday. I looked at RESY first to see if a reservation...
negative.reply: Leslie- thank you for your feedback. If you can, please email us at info@lesupremedetroit.com so we can speak with you directly.

negative.text: We've eaten at le supreme many times, and it's normally very reliable. However, last night something was just off.
negative.reply: Alex, Thank you so much for the feedback on your experience at Le Suprême. I would like to apologize for how slow your service was and the overcooked and flavorless steaks.

negative.text: Really hate having to write this review but felt the public should be warned about the dangers of eating at this...
negative.reply: John- Thank you for the note. We apologize that you got ill. We do not have an email regarding this experience. We take everything with our food extremely seriously.

negative.text: Visited during a birthday back in November and did not enjoy my experience that much. The place is beautiful but the...
negative.reply: Likah, we are truly sorry to hear that your birthday celebration in November was disappointing, and that both the food and service fell short of expectations.

negative.text: The restaurant itself is beautiful. They paid attention to detail on the build, feels like Europe.
negative.reply: Mario, Thank you for the feedback. The experience you described is certainly not up to the standard we hold ourselves to.

negative.text: Awful. Came with my wife for our first anniversary celebration. I made a reservation for 8:45PM and we weren't seated...
negative.reply: Thank you for the feedback. We'd love to discuss this further and see if we can turn this around.
